notes.hypothesis: A second full wipe/air-dry pass may show whether any probe, especially s2, still has additional dry headroom after the first dry-air run.
notes.method: All four probes were wiped again and held in air-dry/open-bench condition. A 60 s capture at 0.5 s cadence was recorded.
notes.findings: Medians were s1 2942, s2 3120, s3 3123, s4 3051 raw ADC. s2 and s3 were essentially unchanged from the first full-dry run; s1 and s4 remained lower.
notes.conclusion: The repeat did not reveal meaningful additional dry headroom for s2 or s3. The persistent channel offsets support per-channel dry calibration.
